title: Senior Financial Analyst - Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Navi Mumbai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services:
Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haribhakti & Co Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
